data.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Verification complete ✓ — all 8 ACs pass. 4/6 new tests are RED (failing as expected: test_skill_defines_modify_existing_test_task_type, test_skill_defines_remove_test_task_type, test_skill_reinforces_behavioral_specification, test_skill_contains_file_impact_test_table). 2/6 passed because SKILL.md already contained 'file impact' and 'fuzzy match' language — still valid as structural content tests.
